headline: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on IDEXX Laboratories Stock?
summary: Although IDEXX Laboratories has lagged the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain fairly bullish about the company’s long-term growth prospects.

headline: IDEXX Expands Fecal Dx Antigen Testing Platform with Taeniid Tapeworm Detection
summary: WESTBROOK, Maine, May 26, 2026--IDEXX expands Fecal Dx™ antigen testing with taeniid tapeworm detection for broader intestinal parasite screening in wellness and sick-pet care.
